## Description
Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality altered)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code quality

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Code formatted with `black` and linted with `ruff`
- [ ] Type hints added for all public functions
- [ ] Docstrings updated (Google/NumPy style)
- [ ] Configuration changes documented
- [ ] No backwards-compatibility issues (or noted above)
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 85%

## Testing
Describe the tests you ran and their results.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or log output.
